Goldman Sachs cuts year-end gold target by $500, doubting rate cuts
news.summary: Goldman Sachs revised its year-end forecast for gold to $4,900, indicating an increase from current levels, but less than previously expected.

news.title: Robinhood平台5月预测市场合约交易量达39亿份，创历史新高
news.summary:
【Robinhood平台5月预测市场合约交易量达39亿份，创历史新高】金色财经报道，6月19日，Robinhood平台2026年5月预测市场合约交易量创下39亿份的历史新高。自去年9月以来，合约成交量涨幅超10倍。

原文链接: https://x.com/TheBlockCo/status/2067886854305923428

news.title: 土耳其央行本周购买100亿美元外汇
news.summary: 【土耳其央行本周购买100亿美元外汇】金色财经报道，6月19日，交易员：本周在伊朗协议后全球市场乐观情绪推动下，土耳其央行购买了100亿美元的外汇。(金十)

news.title: 过去24小时全网爆仓4.52亿美元，主爆多单
news.summary: 【过去24小时全网爆仓4.52亿美元，主爆多单】金色财经报道，6月19日，数据显示，过去24小时全网爆仓4.52亿美元，其中多单爆仓3.67亿美元，空单爆仓8516.18万美元，主爆多单。其中ETH爆仓1.08亿美元，BTC爆仓1.35亿美元。

news.title: Making my solar surplus mining tool open source
news.summary:
Hey!
A few days ago I posted my new project called Solarminer.app into this subreddit.

People kept telling me that closed source is not the way and they would nether install tools on their local server if they weren't able to look into the code.
I don't have bad intentions but its a good thing people want to verify.

So this is where we are now!
I have reorganized the code and created a github org for this project.

news.title: Book:The Orange Robot - A story of success in Bitcoin.
news.summary:
Bitcoiners! I’m seeking readers for my completed debut novel.

The Orange Robot follows Joey Harlan, a young man exiled by his brothers’ jealousy after discovering something that will change his family’s future forever. Set across Ohio, Atlanta, and Florida from 2009 to 2034, the story weaves together construction, early Bitcoin, AI, and a father’s enduring faith in his son across twenty years of separation.

news.title: 恐惧贪婪指数: 14 (Extreme Fear)
news.summary: 当前加密市场恐惧贪婪指数为 14，分类为「Extreme Fear」。 市场处于极度恐惧状态，历史上往往是抄底机会。
